title: tenancy — model traits
description: Trait contract this module contributes (owned) and consumes (from foundation + framework). Traits are the composition unit Laravel modules use to add cross-cutting behaviour without inheritance: a model composes several traits and picks up the columns, scopes, casts, and event hooks each one adds.

owned.description: Every domain row below Tenant on the hierarchy uses this. Adds a `tenant_id` column contract, an auto-fill saving hook, and a global scope that filters reads to the resolved tenant.

compositeIndexes.description: Covers the scan-by-tenant read pattern every tenant repo issues. Leftmost prefix also covers plain `WHERE tenant_id = ?`.

global.name: TenantScope
global.description: Applied at boot. Filters every read to the tenant resolved by the `resolve.tenant` middleware. Bypass via `Model::withoutGlobalScope(TenantScope::class)` — permitted only inside platform-admin contexts.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `tenant_id` on new rows from the resolved tenant. Refuses cross-tenant writes with `TenantException::crossTenantAccess()` (400).

owned.description: Sibling of BelongsToTenant for rows where tenant_id may legitimately be NULL. Two use cases: (1) platform-wide catalogue rows (system SmsOptOut, spam-trap MailSuppression, system-level Audit rows for deploys / cron); (2) cross-tenant boundary rows carrying context from the platform side. Adds the `tenant_id` column contract (nullable), the same auto-fill saving hook (from the resolved tenant when present, null otherwise), and an OPTIONAL global scope that filters rows where tenant_id matches the resolved tenant OR tenant_id IS NULL (platform-wide rows visible to every tenant).

compositeIndexes.description: Covers per-tenant scans AND platform-wide (tenant_id IS NULL) scans via leftmost-prefix.

global.name: TenantOptionalScope
global.description: Applied at boot. `WHERE tenant_id = ? OR tenant_id IS NULL`. Platform-wide rows are visible to every tenant. Bypass via `Model::withoutGlobalScope(TenantOptionalScope::class)` in platform-admin contexts.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `tenant_id` from the resolved tenant when a tenant IS resolved AND the caller has not explicitly set tenant_id=null. When the caller sets tenant_id=null and holds the platform.settings.write-system permission, the null is accepted (platform-wide write).

owned.description: Applied to rows at the tenancy boundary (Tenant, Identity, Domain). Adds `application_id` column contract + auto-fill hook + BelongsTo relation. Does NOT add a global scope — application resolution is host-based and lives in the resolve.tenant middleware.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `application_id` on new rows from the resolved application (bound by host resolution).

notAppliedBy: Every model that composes BelongsToTenant — the tenant_id already implies the application through the FK graph.

consumed.description: Standard Laravel factory support. Applied to every model this module owns.
String primary keys backed by ULID. Applied to every model this module owns (with the prefix layered on top via HasSystemFlag's boot hook or the model's own $keyPrefix).

Adds an `is_system` boolean column plus `system()` / `custom()` query scopes and `isSystem()` / `isCustom()` accessors. Rows the platform seeds are marked `is_system=true` and refused on `Policy@update` / `@delete`.

Adds a `metadata` JSONB column + `array` cast + fluent accessors (`getMetadata($key, $default)`, `setMetadata($key, $value)`, `mergeMetadata(array $bag)`, `forgetMetadata($key)`). Applied to every persistent model in this module for a uniform free-form attribute bag. NEVER queried, always internal / platform-facing (data-classes.json tier `restricted`). Hidden from the wire by default.
Adds the userstamp trio (`created_by`, `updated_by`, `deleted_by`) and auto-fills them from the resolved caller on save / update / soft-delete.
Wraps `owen-it/laravel-auditing`. Writes an audit row for every mutation. Applied to every model this module owns so lifecycle changes always emit an audit trail.
consumed.note: Depends on the `audit` module having `tenant_id` on its `audits` table — see the tenancy-columns.md living gap register.

consumed.description: Applied to every model except DomainRecord (which is diff-state, not lifecycle-tracked).

compositionExample.note: Every tenant-scoped domain model composes traits in this order — framework first (HasFactory, HasUlids), then tenancy boundary traits (BelongsToApplication / BelongsToTenant), then foundation traits (HasSystemFlag / HasUserstamps / HasAuditable), then framework tail (SoftDeletes), then any module-specific traits.

blueprintExample.note: Migrations compose the paired schema macros in the same order the model composes traits. `->tenantable()` adds tenant_id + FK + composite index in one call.
